steps.title: Identify the key finding
steps.content: The researchers found that effort expectancy—perceived ease of use—positively influences users' intention to adopt premium streaming services.

steps.title: Match the implication to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A directly applies this relationship: companies should manage perceived ease because it drives adoption decisions. The other choices either discuss elements beyond the study's scope (B about loyalty across specific services), misinterpret the correlation (C assuming one factor means others don't matter), or contradict it (D questioning the measurement's reliability).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
